things.name: Terracotta Army
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 8,000 life-sized clay soldiers guarding the tomb of Emperor Qin Shi Huang

things.name: City Wall (Ming City Walls)
things.description: Best-preserved ancient city wall in China - cycle or walk the 14km circuit

things.name: Muslim Quarter (Huimin Jie)
things.description: Ancient Hui Muslim street with lamb skewers, pomegranate juice and the Great Mosque

things.name: Great Mosque of Xi'an
things.description: 14th-century mosque in the Muslim Quarter built in traditional Chinese architectural style

things.name: Big Wild Goose Pagoda
things.description: Tang-dynasty 7th-century pagoda where monk Xuanzang translated Buddhist sutras from India

things.name: Shaanxi History Museum
things.description: China's finest provincial museum with 370,000 artefacts spanning 1.15 million years

things.name: Bell Tower & Drum Tower
things.description: Ming-dynasty towers at the heart of the city, drummed to mark dusk

things.name: Huaqing Palace & Hot Springs
things.description: Tang imperial resort where Empress Yang Guifei bathed - scene of an ancient love story

things.name: Silk Road starting point
things.description: Xi'an was the eastern terminus of the ancient Silk Road - marked by the Silk Road monument

things.name: Famen Temple
things.description: Temple housing finger bone relics of the Buddha, 120km from Xi'an
